title: Custom firmware for ESP32 with Ra-01SH-P

messages.author: Izi
messages.text: I wonder if someone already built a custom firmware for the most simple setup with ESP32 with Ra-01SH-P. I have the following wiring diagram, works with Meshtastic DIY firmware, now looking for a built firmware while I'm working to build one myself: ESP32 DevKit (WROOM32) -- Ai‑Thinker RA‑01SH‑P (SX1262) 3V3 -------------------------> 3V3 GND -------------------------> GND GPIO18 -------------------------> NSS GPIO5 -------------------------> SCK GPIO27 -------------------------> MOSI GPIO19 <------------------------- MISO GPIO23 -------------------------> RESET GPIO32 <------------------------- BUSY GPIO33 <------------------------- DIO1 GPIO25 -------------------------> RF_EN Thanks !
messages.content_html: I wonder if someone already built a custom firmware for the most simple setup with ESP32 with Ra-01SH-P. I have the following wiring diagram, works with Meshtastic DIY firmware, now looking for a built firmware while I'm working to build one myself: ESP32 DevKit (WROOM32) -- Ai‑Thinker RA‑01SH‑P (SX1262) 3V3 -------------------------> 3V3 GND -------------------------> GND GPIO18 -------------------------> NSS GPIO5 -------------------------> SCK GPIO27 -------------------------> MOSI GPIO19 <------------------------- MISO GPIO23 -------------------------> RESET GPIO32 <------------------------- BUSY GPIO33 <------------------------- DIO1 GPIO25 -------------------------> RF_EN Thanks !
